text.title: Spatial Accessibility in XR Interfaces Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Spatial Accessibility in XR Interfaces end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: classify-zones
step.action: Classify panels into near / mid / far.

step.name: height-recalibration
step.action: Wire session-start height read; reposition panels.
step.decision-gate: If fixed Y positions remain, STOP.

step.name: occlusion-pass
step.action: Verify at most 1 critical panel may occlude at a time.

step.name: spatial-audio-pair
step.action: Pair each critical event with directional spatial audio.

step.name: seated-alternate
step.action: For each standing-only interaction, define seated alternate.
